transcript: If you're tryin' to vape... uh, have... add vapor, to the retro vaporized nebulizer, then it's not gonna--
[dialogue from Law & Order on TV in background] The morning after Miss Ellison was killed...
[on TV in background] --news about you checking Eddie Newman's phone records.
Might wanna call another Radio Shack, they might know.
[on TV in background] --over... You told me he was not a suspect... I asked you a straightforward question...
[on TV in background] ...I deserve an honest answer.
I'm not aware of any such, uh... device... that'll moisturize an unstable nebulizer.
Uh... do you know you're talking to Radio Shack right now?
Let alone retro nebulize. I've never heard of any kind of retro-nebulization.
